overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character riding a horse through a snowy mountain wilderness during a snowstorm. The character, dressed in winter furs with a horned helmet, traverses snow-covered terrain dotted with pine trees and discovers a large mammoth skeleton partially buried in the snow.

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at a steady trot through open snow-covered terrain with scattered pine trees

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees with heavy snow accumulation on branches
large boulders partially buried in snow on the hillside
deep snow covering the trail and surrounding terrain

segments.scene_description: The character rides through a wide snowy mountain valley with scattered pine trees. The visibility is reduced by falling snow and fog, creating a serene but harsh winter atmosphere. The horse moves steadily forward across the snow-covered ground.

events.description: horse navigates between closely spaced pine trees, slightly adjusting path to avoid obstacles

agents.ego_description: weaving the horse through denser sections of the forest, navigating around trees and rocks

entered.detail: medium-sized rocks protruding from the snow cover
prominent snow-covered boulder in the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The terrain becomes more cluttered with rocks and denser tree coverage. The rider guides the horse through a winding path between snow-laden pines and around rocky outcrops. The atmosphere remains consistently cold and overcast with steady snowfall.

events.description: large mammoth skeleton with tusks comes into view, partially buried in snow
rider turns horse to the right to navigate around the skeleton remains

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling around a massive skeleton, then continuing up the snowy slope

entered.detail: massive skeletal remains of a prehistoric mammal with long curved tusks, partially exposed in the snow
young pine tree on the slope ahead

segments.scene_description: The rider discovers a massive mammoth skeleton with intact tusks lying in the snow. The horse is guided around the remains, turning right to avoid them, then continues ascending the snowy mountain slope. The terrain opens up again as the character moves past the landmark and heads deeper into the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate snowy valley that transitions from an open wilderness into a cluttered mountain pass before ascending toward a distant peak. It begins with the rider moving steadily through a wide, fog-shrouded valley where visibility is limited by falling snow and scattered pine trees. As the horse progresses, the terrain shifts to become more constricted, winding through a denser thicket of snow-laden pines and jagged rocky outcrops under a heavy, overcast sky. The scene then opens up as the rider discovers a massive mammoth skeleton with intact tusks, guiding the horse in a rightward arc to bypass the remains. Finally, the camera follows the character as they leave the landmark behind, ascending a steep snowy slope and heading deeper into the expansive winter wilderness.
